crypto.name: X-LINE-Authorization

key_source.note: The exact HMAC payload assembly (channel secret + URI + request body + nonce) is on the Prerequisites page, not in this source.

verify.desc: Credentials generated by the HMAC SHA256 algorithm, placed in the X-LINE-Authorization request header, alongside X-LINE-Authorization-Nonce and X-LINE-ChannelId.

crypto.source: Request header table (X-LINE-Authorization = HMAC SHA256 credentials; X-LINE-Authorization-Nonce; X-LINE-ChannelId)

field_conditions.rule: Payment confirmation may proceed only after the customer has completed LINE Pay authentication.
field_conditions.when: payment request status check returns returnCode 0110
field_conditions.source: Result code table (0110: you can proceed with payment confirmation)

missing.detail: The HMAC-SHA256 payload assembly (channel secret + URI + request body + nonce) is described on the Prerequisites page, not in the captured overview source, so the signature steps cannot be filled.
The output encoding of the HMAC-SHA256 credential (e.g. Base64) is not stated in this source.
